creator: joe@thrallingpenguin.com
text:
Steve Wills wrote:
> What was the issue with the docs? Was it charset/encoding issues? if so, do you
> have the rdoc gem installed and does the issue go away if you remove that?
There were files not installed that the pkg-plist referenced. I also ran
into trouble with Rdoc /fonts when using Ruby 2.0. I think it's best to
remove the documentation, as the manual at their website is far superior
to the ri & rdoc.

-Joe
